TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tdlu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 583 buwan, 1,631 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 284 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 1,347 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tdlu hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tdlu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tdlu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tdlu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tdlu hya' ga Kiku. tay 'llaw na Tdlu hya' ga Telu'. tay 'zil na Tdlu hya' ga Taukak. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ t*lu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕħou*eŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa kiku. taj ʔllaw na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa teluʔ. taj ʔzil na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa taukak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tdlu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 583 buwan, 1,631 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 284 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 1,347 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tdlu hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tdlu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tdlu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tdlu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tdlu hya' ga Kiku. tay 'llaw na Tdlu hya' ga Telu'. tay 'zil na Tdlu hya' ga Taukak. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ t*lu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕħou*eŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa kiku. taj ʔllaw na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa teluʔ. taj ʔzil na t*lu ħjaʔ ɣa taukak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
